  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ ?_, hx⟩
  exact convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (convex_convexHull ℝ _).restrictScalars (hg_mem n)

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ by simpa using sq_le_sq.2 (hM n)⟩
  have h_cauchy : CauchySeq g := by
    refine Metric.cauchySeq_iff.2 fun ε hε ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cauchy (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    have key : 2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2 =
        (1 / 4) * ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp only [NNReal.val_eq_coe, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_ofNat,
        norm_smul, inv_pow, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_two, mul_pow]
      have := parallelogram_law_with_norm (g n) (g m)
      linarith
    rw [key] at hN
    rw [lt_div_iff (by norm_num), sq_lt_sq] at hN
    exact hN.trans_le (le_abs_self _)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete h_cauchy
  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ ?_, hx⟩
  refine convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) ?_ (hg_mem n)
  intro x hx y hy a b ha hb hab
  simp only [← NNReal.coe_smul, NNReal.coe_add, NNReal.coe_one] at hab ⊢
  exact (convex_convexHull ℝ _).add_smul_mem hx hy hab (NNReal.coe_nonneg a) (NNReal.coe_nonneg b)

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_phi⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2)
    (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _) ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.2 (le_trans (hM n) (le_abs_self M))⟩
  have hg_cauchy : CauchySeq g := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff']
    intro ε hε
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_phi (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq₀ (by positivity) hε]
    have : 2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖^2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖^2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖^2 =
        4⁻¹ * ‖g n - g m‖^2 := by
      simp only [norm_sq_eq_inner, inner_add_left, inner_add_right, inner_smul_left,
        inner_smul_right, real_inner_comm, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_ofNat]
      ring
    rwa [this, lt_div_iff₀ (by norm_num), mul_comm] at hN
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete hg_cauchy
  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ ?_, hx⟩
  exact convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) ((convex_convexHull ℝ _).restrictScalars _) (hg_mem n)

haveI : Module ℝ≥0 E := RestrictScalars.module ℝ≥0 ℝ E
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2)
    (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.2 (abs_le_abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (norm_nonneg _) (hM n))⟩
  have h_cauchy : CauchySeq g := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff_dist_tendsto_0]
    intro ε hε
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cauchy (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    dsimp only at hN
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, mul_add, eq_sub_iff_add_eq.mpr (parallelogram_law (g n) (g m))]
    calc
      2 * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2 =
          4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - 4⁻¹ * ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2) := by ring
      _ = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by
        rw [norm_smul, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_ofNat]
        simp only [norm_eq_abs, abs_cast_nat, Nat.cast_ofNat, inv_pow, pow_two]
        norm_num
      _ < 4 * (ε ^ 2 / 4) := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hN zero_lt_four
      _ = ε ^ 2 := by ring
    · exact le_of_lt hε
    · exact norm_nonneg _
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete h_cauchy
  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ ?_, hx⟩
  refine convexHull_min ?_ ((convex_convexHull ℝ _).restrictScalars ℝ≥0) (hg_hull n)
  exact subset_convexHull ℝ _

letI : Module ℝ≥0 E := RestrictScalars.module ℝ≥0 ℝ E
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_conv⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2)
    (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _) (let ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ pow_le_pow_left (norm_nonneg _) (hM n) 2⟩)
  have h_cauchy : CauchySeq g := by
    refine Metric.cauchySeq_iff.2 fun ε hε ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_conv (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [← sub_lt_iff_lt_add] at hN
    have key : 2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2 =
        4⁻¹ * ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp only [NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_ofNat, inv_eq_one_div (2 : ℝ), smul_add, ← smul_smul,
        Real.norm_smul, mul_pow, norm_inv, Real.norm_two, one_div, inv_pow, sq (2 : ℝ), ← one_div]
      rw [parallelogram_law_with_norm_sq]
      ring
    rwa [key, lt_div_iff (by norm_num), ← sq, sq_lt_sq (norm_nonneg _) (le_of_lt hε)] at hN
  haveI : CompleteSpace E := inferInstance
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete h_cauchy
  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ ?_, hx⟩
  exact convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (fun x hx y hy a b hab ↦
    (convex_convexHull ℝ _) hx hy a b a.2 b.2 (by norm_cast; exact hab)) (hg_mem n)
